experience.title: Gallery Director
responsibilities: Curated art exhibitions showcasing contemporary artists.
Managed relationships with artists and collectors to promote artwork.
Developed marketing strategies to increase gallery foot traffic and sales.
Collaborated with local businesses for community events to enhance gallery visibility.

experience.title: Production Manager
responsibilities: Oversaw all production aspects for theatrical performances.
Coordinated schedules and budgets for productions.
Led a team of stagehands and actors to ensure smooth performances.
Implemented safety protocols for crew and audience members.

response.summary: Creative and detail-oriented arts professional with a strong background in gallery management and theatrical production. Proven ability to lead teams and curate engaging exhibitions, seeking to transition into a new industry to explore new opportunities.
